text.title: Google Ads Reporting and Optimization Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the account have ≥30 days of history AND ≥100 conversions per variant?

text.example: preconditions=true (61 days, 73 conv) → apply ads-google-reporting → report + action queue.
